BondOfLastLamp.title: BondOfLastLamp
BondOfLastLamp.Name: [color=#60b0ff]Bond of the Last Lamp[/color]
BondOfLastLamp.Description:
On [color=#78bca4]prayer[/color]:

     apply [color=#60b0ff]Lampblack Ward[/color] to yourself
     summon a [color=#60d0ff]Coal-Moth[/color]
     deal [color=#8030af]Astral damage[/color] to the closest enemy

[color=#a0a0a0]Ward duration = 4 * skill level
Damage = 10 * skill level[/color]

SaintOfLastLamp.title: SaintOfLastLamp
SaintOfLastLamp.name: [color=#60b0ff]Saint of the Last Lamp[/color]
SaintOfLastLamp.brief: Prayer kindles ward-light, calls a coal-moth, and scorches the nearest foe.
SaintOfLastLamp.description_start: The saint's prayer shrouds you in soot-light and sends a pale moth drifting ahead of your wrath.
SaintOfLastLamp.prayer: O last lamp, burn where the stars have failed.
SaintOfLastLamp.description: A god-entry showcase using a custom skill, custom invoke logic, a custom buff, and a custom ally together.

LastLampLitany.title: LastLampLitany
LastLampLitany.name: [color=#60b0ff]Last Lamp Litany[/color]
LastLampLitany.description:
Apply [color=#60b0ff]Lampblack Ward[/color] to yourself

Summon a [color=#60d0ff]Coal-Moth[/color]

Deal [color=#8030af]Astral damage[/color] to the closest enemy

[color=#78bca4]+1 charge[/color] when you [color=#ffff50]enter[/color] a new area
LastLampLitany.description_short: Ward yourself, call a coal-moth, and burn the nearest foe with astral lampfire.

LampblackWard.title: LampblackWard
LampblackWard.name: Lampblack Ward
LampblackWard.description: A ring of soot-light circles the bearer, dulling the first hungry reach of the dark.

CoalMoth.title: CoalMoth
CoalMoth.name: Coal-Moth
CoalMoth.description: A moth of ash-blue light that circles prayers and follows them into battle.

actions.message: The [color=#60b0ff]Last Lamp[/color] burns through the dark.

BondOfLastLamp.title: BondOfLastLamp
BondOfLastLamp.text: When the last shrine-lamp burns down to soot, the saint is said to walk beside it. The faithful speak low, breathe ash, and send coal-moths ahead into the dark.
